original_query: SELECT "EMP0"."ENAME" FROM (SELECT * FROM "EMP" WHERE "ENAME" = 'A') AS "t0" LEFT JOIN "EMP" AS "EMP0" ON "t0"."JOB" = "EMP0"."JOB" GROUP BY "EMP0"."ENAME"
rewritten_query: SELECT "EMP0"."ENAME" FROM (SELECT * FROM "EMP" WHERE "ENAME" = 'A') AS "t0" LEFT JOIN "EMP" AS "EMP0" ON "t0"."JOB" = "EMP0"."JOB" GROUP BY "EMP0"."ENAME"
